title: Oldisek Modern GUI
description: Makes minecraft GUI transparent and modern
body:
# Oldisek's Modern GUI

Oldisek's Modern GUI is a resource pack that makes the Minecraft GUI more modern and transparent. It also has support for several mods, including:

- Inventory Profiles Next
- Status
- VoiceChat
- ReplayMod (WIP)

Also, Oldisek's Modern GUI supports the following GUIs:

- Anvil
- Furnaces
- Crafting table
- Dispenser
- Enchanting table
- Gamemode switch
- Chests
- Hopper
- Inventory
- Shulker box
- Smoker
- Stone cutter
- Creative inventory

This resource pack is perfect for players who want to give their Minecraft experience a fresh, modern look. Whether you're playing alone or with friends, Oldisek's Modern GUI is sure to enhance your gameplay experience. And if you don't want your eyes to be burned, this resource pack is a great choice as well.
